records.stderr_pattern: cannot find module providing package|go: module .* found .* but does not contain
records.description: go module not found — enable module-aware mode to auto-download

records.stderr_pattern: build constraints exclude all Go files in|no Go files in
records.description: CGO or platform build constraint failure — disable CGO

records.stderr_pattern: missing go\.sum entry for module|go\.sum: checksum mismatch
records.description: go.sum incomplete or mismatch — disable sum check and enable mod download

records.stderr_pattern: cannot find package|no required module provides package
records.description: Package not found — set GOPATH to cwd and enable module mode

records.stderr_pattern: permission denied|EPERM|go: writing go\.mod: permission denied
records.description: Go build cache or module permission denied — redirect to writable /tmp directories
